articles.title: About — Lingadevaru H P
articles.excerpt: Lingadevaru H P (Thoshan) — builder of deployed blockchain, AI/ML, web, and self-hosted infrastructure projects. Creator of FOSS Coin on Solana, Thoshan Flash LLM, and Libre Cloud homelab.

articles.title: FOSS Coin ($FOSS)
articles.excerpt: An SPL token on Solana Mainnet built to symbolise support for Free and Open Source Software. Created by Lingadevaru H P. Live on Orca Whirlpool DEX with a fixed 1B supply.

articles.title: Thoshan Flash
articles.excerpt: A QLoRA fine-tune of Google's Gemma-2-9B large language model (LLM) by Lingadevaru H P, published on Hugging Face with 28+ downloads and a live Gradio inference interface.

articles.title: Insurance DApp
articles.excerpt: Decentralised insurance application on the Ethereum blockchain using Solidity smart contracts, Truffle, Web3.js, and MetaMask integration.

articles.title: Libre Cloud — Homelab
articles.excerpt: Zero-trust self-hosted infrastructure on Oracle Cloud Always Free tier. Cloudflare-fronted reverse proxy with a planned 14-service architecture.

articles.title: Privacy Stack
articles.excerpt: Layered personal privacy setup: OS hardening with Omarchy/Arch, LibreWolf browser, hardware DNS filtering, WireGuard VPN, and self-hosted password management.

articles.title: Linux Setup — Omarchy
articles.excerpt: Arch Linux via Omarchy — DHH's opinionated 'omakase' dev distro with Hyprland tiling WM, Neovim, and a full terminal developer workflow.

articles.title: Fraud Detection System
articles.excerpt: Final Year Project: online banking fraud detection using ASP.NET and a 4-algorithm ML ensemble (Logistic Regression, KNN, SVM, CNN) with auto-blocking.

articles.title: LocalPulse
articles.excerpt: Local-first event discovery platform built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, Clerk auth, and Firebase. PWA with offline support and PDF ticketing.

articles.title: Learning Roadmap
articles.excerpt: Planned certifications in networking, cloud, and cybersecurity (CCNA, Security+). Tools being learned: Vim/Neovim, Obsidian. CS50 Cybersecurity in progress.
